caption: A large white airplane with red and blue stripes and the red text "РОССИЯ" on its fuselage is captured on a snowy airfield. The sequence begins with a close-up view of the aircraft's wing and engine as it moves. The perspective then shifts to a wide shot, showing the plane taxiing across a snow-covered runway under a clear blue sky. In the background, a line of leafless brown trees and a distant body of water are visible. As the airplane continues to move forward, it remains centered in the frame, gliding across the white expanse of the airfield. A red circular logo containing the white number "13" is present in the top right corner of every scene. No people are visible in any of the frames.
